creator: wshafer@relivinc.com
text: OCI8 port causes segfault when exiting. There is a detailed description of the problem located at: http://canonical.wordpress.com/2007/09/12/freebsd-php-oci8-segfault-fix/ which will describe the problem in more detail then I can give. There is also a patch for php included on this page, but this fix seems more like a work around and not an actual fix to the problem. Below I have included all the information I can think of to assist you with the problem. If you need more please let me know. Westin Shafer dmesg shows the following: pid 11209 (httpd), uid 80: exited on signal 11 Apache22 Info: Server version: Apache/2.2.8 (FreeBSD) Server built: Jan 22 2008 20:56:15 Compiled in modules:
